heading: Establishment and operation of technical offices
label: 2542 Establishment and operation of technical offices
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under subsec. (b) of this section delegated to Secretary of Commerce regarding technical office established under subsec. (a)(1) of this section, and to Secretary of Agriculture regarding technical office established under subsec. (a)(2) of this section, see section 1–103(a) of Ex. Ord. No. 12188, , 45 F.R. 990, set out as a note under .Jan. 2, 1980section 2171 of this title

children.heading: For nonagricultural products
children.label: 1 For nonagricultural products
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce shall establish and maintain within the Department of Commerce a technical office that shall carry out the functions prescribed under subsection (b) with respect to nonagricultural products.

children.heading: For agricultural products
children.label: 2 For agricultural products
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall establish and maintain within the Department of Agriculture a technical office that shall carry out the functions prescribed under subsection (b) with respect to agricultural products.

children.heading: Functions of offices
children.label: b Functions of offices
children.text: The President shall prescribe for each technical office established under subsection (a) such functions as the President deems necessary or appropriate to implement this subchapter.
